creator: petef@databits.net
text:
It looks like the author has been busy, an update to 3.04 (from 3.02):

--- Makefile.orig	Mon Jun 11 18:28:37 2001
+++ Makefile	Mon Jun 11 18:28:40 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tkseti
-PORTVERSION=	3.02
+PORTVERSION=	3.04
 CATEGORIES=	astro tk83
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.cuug.ab.ca/~macdonal/tkseti/
 
--- distinfo.orig	Mon Jun 11 18:28:18 2001
+++ distinfo	Mon Jun 11 18:28:42 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (tkseti-3.02.tar.gz) = 39737ce37fccf3fd7ff9a3680d2b7a66
+MD5 (tkseti-3.04.tar.gz) = c02fc58627295eefe9fdc924facc0b83

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
